meaning: adj.凶恶的,残忍的,凶猛的,<口>十分强烈的,极度的
examples: Marduk defeats Tiamat, the watery ferocious deep monster.
From ferocious birds of prey to shy songbirds, Zuckerman has captured our avian neighbors in fascinating new ways.
ladybird larvae are among the biggest friends we gardeners have. They're ferocious predators on problem whitefly and red spider mite.
After the movie Jaws, sharks are perceived as ferocious predators aggressively devouring innocent swimmers.
But before a page could be turned there came a ferocious hammering at the door.
